---
title: "Teaching Experience"
---

Beyond methodological research, I am committed to statistics and biostatistics education, eventually bridging complex statistical theory with practical, computational implementation.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Johns Hopkins University

*Teaching Assistant (Aug 2025 – Present)*

-   **140.751-2:** Advanced Methods in Biostatistics
-   **140.778:** Statistical Computing, Algorithm, and Software Development
-   **140.779:** Advanced Statistical Computing

## Duke University

*Teaching Assistant (Aug 2023 – May 2024)*

-   **STA 610:** Multilevel and Hierarchical Models
-   **STA 432:** Theory and Methods of Statistical Learning and Inference

## Carleton College

*Teaching Assistant (Sep 2020 – May 2022)*

-   **STA 320:** Time Series Analysis
-   **STA 230:** Applied Regression Analysis
-   **STA 220:** Introduction to Data Science

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Quantitative & Academic Advising

-   **Undergraduate Student Departmental Advisor** (Carleton College)
-   **Comprehensive Integrative Exercise Consultant**, Quantitative Resource Center (Northfield, MN \| Sep 2021 – June 2022)
-   **Statistical Consultant** (Northfield Area Family YMCA \| Jan 2021 – Mar 2021)
